query: I need assistance in creating a 5-day travel plan for a group of 4 people. Our group will be traveling from Philadelphia to visit 2 cities in Missouri from March 5th, 2022, to March 9th, 2022. We have a budget of $9,000 for this trip. During our stay, we would love to enjoy Chinese and American cuisines.
